title: Follow us - Canada.ca
content:
Employment and Social Development Canada (ESDC) uses social media channels and Web 2.0 tools in an effort to provide timely and accurate information to Canadians. You can also stay connected with Service Canada to keep up with their activities and initiatives.
- Participation in Social Media
- Commenting Standards
- Consultation and Engagement
Note: No endorsement of any products or services is expressed or implied by the use of a particular social media channel.
Learn how ESDC is working towards building a stronger and more competitive Canada on the ESDC YouTube channel .
Stay up to date with the latest news, tips and reminders from ESDC by following @ESDC_GC or @AccessibleGC on X.
Add a Job Bank widget to your site and provide your visitors with direct access to free up-to-date information about jobs.
Stay up to date with the latest news and information from ESDC by following Employment and Social Development Canada , Accessible Canada , and Seniors in Canada on Facebook.
Stay up to date with the latest news and images from ESDC by following ESDC.GC and Youth in Canada on Instagram.
Stay up to date with the latest news and information from ESDC by following Employment and Social Development Canada , Labour Program and Canada 2030 Agenda .
